description: petirico.workers.dev hosts a Cloudflare Workers service. The discovered public endpoint is an MCP server named acheter-ou-louer-mcp, which reports service status and version at its root URL.
summary: petirico.workers.dev exposes one public MCP server: Buy Or Rent Simulator over SSE at https://acheter-ou-louer-mcp.petirico.workers.dev/mcp; no other public API, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found.
